privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated soil survey report document located at /home/ga/Documents/soil_survey_report.odt. All required H1 sections ('Executive Summary', 'Site Description...', etc.) and H2 subsections ('Ap Horizon...', etc.) exactly match the paragraphs injected by setup_task.sh. Key content samples and soil science keywords (e.g., 'Argiudoll', 'CEC', 'Clarion') are confirmed to be present in the raw generated text.
